answers: 3-2-1 rule: 3 copies of data, on 2 different media, with 1 offsite. This protects against most disasters.
Backup types: full (everything), incremental (changes since last backup), differential (changes since last full backup).
Best practices: automate backups, encrypt sensitive data, test restores regularly, and document your backup procedures.
Backup options: local NAS, external drives, cloud (AWS S3, Backblaze, Google Drive), and database-specific tools.
